results.title: China’s ‘Green Great Wall’ tames desert growth, but scientists warn fight is not over
results.description: For half a century, millions of workers have repeated a task across the deserts in northern China: inserting forearm-length sticks into shifting sand, first in a row, then in an intersecting line, gradually forming a grid. Then saplings are planted at the centre of each small square. The technique, known as “straw checkerboards,” is a [...]
